title: Book Of Nonsense Limerick 30.
content:
There was a Young Lady whose eyes,
    Were unique as to colour and size;
    When she opened them wide,
    People all turned aside,
    And started away in surprise.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Edward Lear, titled "Book Of Nonsense Limerick 30.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
